meaning: n.沙,沙子,[pl.] 沙滩,沙地v.撒沙子
examples: She traced a line in the sand.
His hair was the colour of sand.
She explored the sand with her toes.
From here, a short stroll along a white-sand beach offers a good view of Hangman Island.
It is where they celebrate, socialise, exercise or relax with a book on the sand.
